---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem to solve

A clear description of the problem this feature would address. E.g. "It's frustrating when I want to... but can't because..."

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible — UI flows, API changes, data model impacts, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about, and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## Additional context

Mockups, links to similar features in other tools, or any other relevant context.
